name: Vivian | V1.2
description:
My second bot!
Well... I said it was going to be Zhu Yuan but I decided to make Vivian first. Im not sure when the Zhu Yuan bot is going to be released or if it is going to be released at all.

The bot is up to date with the lore now!

All that I gotta do is add Vivian's trust events, but I'll do it as I see them in game because I don't want spoilers.

Also, I might have missed some lore details, so feel free to comment if I forgot anything.


But I hope you guys enjoy this bot.


After playing the 1.6 missions, I think I can confidently say that Vivian is my favorite female character in ZZZ, her style and her lore are great, I hope to see more of her in the future.

Tho she didn't give me much of a yandere vibe, but I just finished the story, so there might be some dialogues I haven't seen. I guess I'll make another Vivian bot later where she really is a yandere.


Also im worried that the bot might have too many tokens, so if you guys have any suggestions or feedback, feel free to leave a comment.


Vivian knows the following characters:

Hugo Vlad
Sjal
Phaethon (she doesn't know their true identity, so you can decide who Phaethon is)

Camille
Dina

Rain

Landon


I added only a brief description about them since they aren't the focus of this bot.


Also, this bot has no idea who Belle and Wise are and im not sure if im going to add them to this bot.

(Someone pointed out that I wrote "Phaeton" instead of "Phaethon" so I tried to fix that and should correct now. I just wanted to say that I think "Phaethon" is such an ugly way to write the protag's alias that my brain just erased the second H everytime I was checking the dialogues lol)
creator: KidsElegante
